title: Buffer Primitives Experiments
blurb:
### Removed (2026-03-21)

The following experiments were consolidated into the 4 experiments above and deleted:
- `rawlayout-release-verifier-crash/` (30 variants) → `rawlayout-llvm-verifier-crash/` V01-V06
- `slab-deinit-workaround/` → `rawlayout-deinit-alternatives/` V04
- `noncopyable-enum-modify/` → `rawlayout-sil-ownership-crash/` V02
- `copy-propagation-noncopyable-enum/` → `rawlayout-sil-ownership-crash/` V01
- `small-enum-modify-recovery/` → `rawlayout-sil-ownership-crash/` V03
- `cross-module-type-declaration/` → `rawlayout-llvm-verifier-crash/` V04

experiments.purpose: Validate three-layer architecture (Header / Static Ops / Composed Type) with Storage.Heap
experiments.statusDetail: API/package drift; experiment premise no longer expressible against current toolchain or peer-package API

experiments.purpose: Verify Storage.Initialization consistency across Linear, Ring, and Slab disciplines
Benchmark composed type (Ring.Growable) vs direct static method calls
experiments.statusDetail: API/package drift; experiment premise no longer expressible against current toolchain or peer-package API

experiments.purpose: Validate static + Property.View pattern: consuming ~Copyable, CoW overloads, _modify, callAsFunction, overload coexistence
Test generic Spill\<Inline, Heap\> building block for factoring Small buffer pattern — mechanically feasible but net savings marginal
Consuming transfer of bitmap between ~Copyable types

experiments.statusDetail: API/package drift; experiment premise no longer expressible against current toolchain or peer-package API

experiments.purpose: Consolidated: LLVM verifier crash — 8 variants (V01-V08) covering baseline, struct-body threshold, extension-file, cross-module, class-ref, wrapper patterns, ~Copyable elements, pre-compiled deinit
experiments.statusDetail: (bug) — #86652 STILL BROKEN in Swift 6.3; workaround required
experiments.statusRaw: CONFIRMED (bug) — #86652 STILL BROKEN in Swift 6.3; workaround required

experiments.purpose: Consolidated: SIL ownership crash + enum _modify — 3 variants (V01-V03) covering CopyPropagation, enum _modify limitation, recovery strategies. SUPERSEDED for Bug 2 by root cause fix (removed ~Escapable from Property.View, 2026-03-22)
Consolidated: deinit workaround alternatives — 4 variants (V01-V04) covering discard self, guard idempotence, escapable lifetime, slab bitmap cleanup
experiments.statusDetail: — alternatives still relevant in Swift 6.3 (#86652 unfixed)
experiments.statusRaw: CONFIRMED — alternatives still relevant in Swift 6.3 (#86652 unfixed)

experiments.purpose: Standalone minimal reproducer: Bug 1 REPRODUCES (3-module chain, 2+ cross-module @_rawLayout fields), Bug 2 does NOT reproduce (7 patterns tried — missing ~Escapable ingredient)
experiments.status: Bug 1: CONFIRMED (still in 6.3), Bug 2: REFUTED (fixed in 6.3)
experiments.statusRaw: Bug 1: CONFIRMED (still in 6.3), Bug 2: REFUTED (fixed in 6.3)

experiments.purpose: Bug 2 standalone reproducer: ~Escapable + @_lifetime(borrow) view type yields double end_lifetime in CopyPropagation. 4 variants tested: V1 crash, V2 fix (drop ~Escapable), V3 fix (@_optimize(none) on _read accessor), V4 no fix (init-level @_optimize(none) insufficient)
experiments.statusRaw: SUPERSEDED — #88022 fixed in Swift 6.3; 149 @_optimize(none) sites removed

experiments.purpose: 3-package nested ~Copyable deinit chain reproducer (swiftlang/swift#86652). Moved from swift-institute.
experiments.statusRaw: CONFIRMED (production only) — #86652 still reproducing in Swift 6.3

experiments.purpose: Access level is an independent trigger: internal builds, public/package crash. Canary for compiler fix — when this passes with public, all 22 _deinitWorkaround sites can be removed.
experiments.statusDetail: — Canary UNCHANGED in Swift 6.3; 22 workaround sites remain
experiments.statusRaw: CONFIRMED — Canary UNCHANGED in Swift 6.3; 22 workaround sites remain
